title: Sean Konot
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Sean Konot''' was the letterer for "[[Incident at Horn Station]]," ''[[Star Wars: Crimson Empire (TPB)]]'', [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 0|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 0]], and the co-author for "[[The Hidden]]."
